source_jobs.title: AI Product Focus - Senior Full Stack / Rails Engineer (Boston)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YUMA AI:

Yuma is building a next-generation orchestration platform that deploys autonomous AI agents dedicated to customer support in e-commerce.
We already support 150+ paying merchants and help them automate up to 80% of their customer tickets freeing human agents for higher-value conversations.

Founded by Guillaume Luccisano (3rd-time YC founder) at the end of 2022, Yuma is one of the leaders in the AI Support Automation space with 10+ consecutive months of double-digit growth.

We are now a team of 30 passionate and ambitious people based between Paris, Barcelona and Boston and have grown revenue 5x in 2025. We aim to repeat this trajectory in 2026. The scale-up phase is fully underway. 🚀


ABOUT THE ROLE :

This is a foundational role. You will be joining Yuma as one of the core engineers on a tight, high-performing team of 5. We move fast, iterate aggressively, and care deeply about product quality and user value.

Over the past two years, we’ve built an impressive amount of product surface area, AI systems, and automation. Yet what lies ahead is even bigger. As we scale our platform, models, and AI agents, your work will have a direct and immediate impact on the experience of thousands of users.

This role goes far beyond classical backend development. You will work across the full product lifecycle: new features, A/B tests, model integrations, AI agent pipelines, and performance optimization. If you enjoy working at the intersection of backend engineering, product iteration, and applied AI, you will thrive here.




BACKEND ENGINEERING:

 - Architect, build, and scale large Ruby on Rails applications

 - Own major systems within our Rails API, including performance, reliability, and maintainability

 - Manage PostgreSQL at scale: schema design, indexing, performance diagnostics

 - Maintain and optimize Redis + Sidekiq pipelines for high-throughput workloads

 - Lead backend-heavy feature projects, from design to deployment
   


AI / LLM SYSTEMS:

 - Integrate, evaluate, and iterate on LLM providers and models

 - Design systems that manage non-deterministic model outputs safely and predictably

 - Build and own A/B tests, eval pipelines, and agentic workflows

 - Optimize for latency, reliability, and cost across LLM-heavy features

 - Contribute directly to prompts, agents, and AI system architecture
   


PRODUCT & FULL-STACK CONTRIBUTION :

 - Collaborate tightly with founders and engineers to define product requirements

 - Jump into frontend (Next.js/React) when needed to ship features end-to-end

 - Run rapid product iterations: fast feedback loops, experimentation, data-driven decisions

 - Maintain a high bar for product quality while optimizing for speed of execution
   


THE IDEAL YOU

 - You have 5–10+ years of experience building and scaling production Rails applications

 - Rails has no secrets for you : you know how to ship quickly and safely

 - You are pragmatic: you make thoughtful trade-offs that maximize user value and iteration speed

 - You naturally take ownership and thrive in high-velocity environments

 - You have recent, hands-on experience with LLMs and already use AI in your day-to-day workflow

 - You’re comfortable navigating ambiguity, experimenting, and working with non-deterministic systems

 - You can contribute across the stack when needed (backend-first, but not backend-only)

 - You deeply care about product quality, speed, and delivering a great user experience




THE ALTERNATIVE YOU :

If you're still early in your career but see yourself becoming the engineer described above within the next 2–3 years, don’t hesitate. We consistently leave room for raw talent and high potential, especially for people who learn fast, care deeply, and want to grow.




WHY YUMA?

 - High impact with ownership from day one : join a small, international engineering team where every feature you ship and every solution you design is directly visible in production.

 - Competitive compensatio

source_jobs.title: AI Solution Engineer - Full-stack / Rails Engineer (Barcelona)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YUMA AI:

Yuma is building a next-generation orchestration platform that deploys autonomous AI agents dedicated to customer support in e-commerce.
We already support 150+ paying merchants and help them automate up to 80% of their customer tickets freeing human agents for higher-value conversations.

Founded by Guillaume Luccisano (3rd-time YC founder) at the end of 2022, Yuma is one of the leaders in the AI Support Automation space with 10+ consecutive months of double-digit growth.

We are now a team of 30 passionate and ambitious people based between Paris, Barcelona and Boston and have grown revenue 5x in 2025. We aim to repeat this trajectory in 2026. The scale-up phase is fully underway. 🚀


ROLE OVERVIEW

We remain a small team of 5 engineers, but we are intense and we move very quickly! Fast iteration is key. In the past 2 years since Yuma’s founding, we’ve built a lot, but there is still much more to do! We operate at startup speed and handle everything: product iterations, A/B testing, LLM research, AI Agents pipeline, new feature development, performance optimizations, and more. We are intensely focused on delivering value to our users and on product excellence. That is the only thing that matters.

Our backend is a standard Ruby on Rails API powered by PostgreSQL, Redis, and Sidekiq. Our frontend uses Next.js and React. We already handle a significant load, ingesting and processing millions of support tickets per month and millions of e-commerce data points per day.

We are definitely not a 9-to-5 team, and we are heavily committed to delivering excellence throughout our craft.




THE IDEAL YOU:

You have led and built multiple large Rails applications, and you always strive for excellence. You are pragmatic, making the right trade-offs that favor speed of iteration while maintaining high product quality. You are driven by delivering the best experience and value to your users. You might have a preference for working on backend projects, but you aren't afraid of frontend work. Rails has no secrets for you.

Recent experience playing with LLMs is now mandatory, and you have already adopted AI in your day-to-day tasks. Building with LLMs and managing non-deterministic output is not scary to you.

If you are relentless, deeply caring about delivering value & ownership, and looking to join an early, hard-working team, we want you 👈. We are seeking someone who is looking to embrace a new challenge and commit to it 100%.

Your diploma doesn't matter to us; we only care about your skills, your sense of ownership, and drive.




THE ALTERNATIVE YOU:

If you’re still junior, but the description above sounds like the person you aim to become in the next 3 years, don’t be shy: there’s always space for raw talent at Yuma.



Dont' be shy, apply! :)


OUR CULTURE

Please, if you are considering applying, first read our culture page:

https://www.notion.so/yuma-ai/Yuma-Culture-and-Values-2fe1b02ffe8b8083b2d6e388ecd17748

source_jobs.title: Senior DevOps / Infrastructure & AI LLM Systems Engineer (Hybrid)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YUMA AI:

Yuma is building a next-generation orchestration platform that deploys autonomous AI agents dedicated to customer support in e-commerce.
We already support 150+ paying merchants and help them automate up to 80% of their customer tickets freeing human agents for higher-value conversations.

Founded by Guillaume Luccisano (3rd-time YC founder) at the end of 2022, Yuma is one of the leaders in the AI Support Automation space with 10+ consecutive months of double-digit growth.

We are now a team of 30 passionate and ambitious people based between Paris, Barcelona and Boston and have grown revenue 5x in 2025. We aim to repeat this trajectory in 2026. The scale-up phase is fully underway. 🚀




ABOUT THE ROLE :

This is a foundational role. You will be our first dedicated DevOps/Infrastructure Engineer and will take full ownership of everything related to cloud infrastructure, deployments, reliability, and scaling.

Our engineering team is made up of 7 people, operates with intensity, and moves fast. Rapid iteration is one of our biggest advantages. Over the past two years, we’ve built a tremendous amount, but the surface area ahead of us is even larger as we scale usage, models, and automation. You will play a key role in keeping our platform fast, reliable, and ahead of the curve.

This role goes beyond DevOps. You will also contribute at the LLM layer: running evaluations, experimenting with models, improving latency, optimizing costs, and helping shape how our AI systems operate at scale. If you enjoy working at the intersection of infrastructure, backend systems, and AI, this is exactly the kind of role where you’ll thrive.




WHAT YOU WILL OWN :

Infrastructure & Platform :

 - All cloud infrastructure across AWS, GCP, and Azure.

 - Kubernetes cluster management, scaling, upgrades, and security.

 - CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions) and deployment systems.

 - Observability, monitoring, logging, alerting, and reliability practices.

 - Incident response, on-call rotation, and uptime improvements.

 - Cost optimization and infra-level performance tuning.

 - Security best practices, IAM, secrets, policies, and overall infra hygiene.

Backend & Data Systems :

 - High-scale PostgreSQL (large DB, indexes, performance tuning).

 - Redis and Sidekiq pipelines, queue scaling, job parallelization.

 - API performance and throughput.

AI / LLM Systems :

 - Manage and optimize LLM deployments across cloud providers.

 - Improve latency, reliability, and cost through routing and system architecture.

 - Help build and maintain eval pipelines and A/B tests.

 - Contribute directly at the app level (prompts, agents, routing).

 - Support or prototype self-hosted model experiments (optional but valuable).
   


THE IDEAL YOU :

You have 8+ years of experience in DevOps / infrastructure roles, ideally in fast-paced SaaS or startup environments. You’ve scaled production systems before and know how systems behave under real load.

You’re equally comfortable deep in Kubernetes or writing Ruby/Python for a quick script, tool or LLM eval. You care about reliability, speed and pragmatism. You enjoy working on AI systems and have hands-on experience with LLM-powered applications.

Your toolkit includes:

 - Kubernetes, Docker

 - AWS, Azure, GCP (strong in at least 2)

 - GitHub Actions CI/CD

 - PostgreSQL, Redis, Sidekiq

 - LLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure, Anthropic; self-hosted a plus)

 - Terraform or similar IaC

 - Strong coding ability to contribute across the stack
   


THE ALTERNATIVE YOU :

If you're earlier in your career but have strong infrastructure experience and clear upside, and you can reasonably grow into the full scope within 2 to 3 years, feel free to reach out. Raw talent is welcome, but depth of experience scaling systems is a big plus here.




WHY YUMA ?

 - High impact with ownership from day one : join a small, international engineering team where every feature you ship and every solution you design is direct

source_jobs.title: Mid-Market Sales Development Representative  DACH 🇩🇪🇫🇷 (Barcelona)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT YUMA AI:

Yuma is building a next-generation orchestration platform that deploys autonomous AI agents dedicated to customer support in e-commerce.
We already support 150+ paying merchants and help them automate up to 80% of their customer tickets freeing human agents for higher-value conversations.

Founded by Guillaume Luccisano (3rd-time YC founder) at the end of 2022, Yuma is one of the leaders in the AI Support Automation space with 10+ consecutive months of double-digit growth.

We are now a team of 30 passionate and ambitious people based between Paris, Barcelona and Boston and have grown revenue 5x in 2025. We aim to repeat this trajectory in 2026. The scale-up phase is fully underway. 🚀

About the role :

We’re looking for an ambitious and curious Sales Development Representative to join our growing team in Barcelona 🚀

You’ll be one of the first points of contact for some of Europe's most exciting e-commerce brands, creating genuine connections and opening new business opportunities.

As part of our high-performing sales team, you’ll work hand-in-hand with our Account Executives to spark interest, build pipeline, and help Yuma AI keep growing at double-digit speed.



What you’ll do :

 - Identify, research, and reach out to key decision-makers

 - Generate new business opportunities through multi-channel outreach (cold calls, emails, LinkedIn).

 - Personalize your approach and build meaningful first conversations about AI-powered customer support.

 - Collaborate closely with AEs to qualify leads and schedule discovery meetings.

 - Become a product expert on Yuma AI’s platform and the future of customer service automation.

 - Use tools like HubSpot (CRM), Apollo, Sales Navigator to manage your pipeline and workflow.



What we’re looking for :

 - 6+ months experience in a B2B SDR or outbound sales role (SaaS experience is a plus).

 - Fluent german (French is a plus)

 - Excellent written and oral communication skills

 - Energy, curiosity, and resilience : you love learning and don’t give up easily.

 - Strong organization and self-drive : you thrive in a fast-paced, autonomous environment.

 - Comfortable using AI tools to boost productivity.

 - Track record of achieving sales metrics and necessary work ethic and attitude to achieve quota attainment, consistently
   
   

Why Yuma :

 - Fast growth = fast learning curve : our best SDRs quickly move up to AE or team lead roles.

 - Join a small international team where your impact is visible every week.

 - Uncapped variable + equity.

 - Hybrid work: our sunny Barcelona office + remote flexibility.

 - Work closely with the founders and sales leadership team

 - Access to a company culture based on ownership, transparency, and growth mindset.

 - Bonus: join us before end of January 2026 and you’ll be part of our team offsite in Marrakech ;)



About your manager:

You’ll report to Louis Coussen, who’s spent almost 10 years in e-commerce and somehow managed to beat every target along the way. His style is pretty simple: solid sales basics, a lot of energy, and he treats every “no” like it’s just step one before a “yes.”

Outside of work, he’s the guy who always knows the best restaurants, never refuses a good beer, and will drag you into many padel games if you’re not careful. He’s also done multiple triathlons, but don’t worry, he won’t make you run one.

If you’re looking for a manager who sets the bar high, stays close to the team, and helps you grow fast, that’s exactly what you’ll get.


Before applying :

Take a moment to read our Culture Page https://www.notion.so/yuma-ai/Yuma-s-Culture-5b0e15f1334242ce8a62daab9f2038a1?pvs=4 — it will give you a sense of who we are and how we work.

👉 Ready to join a fast-scaling AI startup and grow your career in sales?
We’d love to meet you. Apply now!


OUR CULTURE

Please, if you are considering applying, first read our culture page:

https://www.notion.so/yuma-ai/Yuma-Culture-and-Values-2fe1b02ffe8b8083b2d6e3

notes: AI Support Automation space with 10+ consecutive months of double-digit growth
